title: Runtime resource limits for terminal stability
rationale: Typed frontend getters, server runtime config exposure, schema support, and tests already exist.

title: Browser WebSocket input backpressure
rationale: Input-only backpressure decision logic and bounded retry behavior are implemented and unit tested.

title: Visible terminal output scheduling and recovery
rationale: Visible output scheduling, overflow detection, and recovery are implemented and covered by focused tests.

title: Terminal snapshot storage budgets and tombstone expiry
rationale: Snapshot size, total budget, entry count, quota recovery, and tombstone TTL tests exist.

title: Terminal runtime residency limits
rationale: LRU hidden terminal residency with visible pinning is implemented and unit tested.

title: Split WebSocket handshake and channel isolation
rationale: Unified, split-shadow, and split handshake logic is feature-flagged and tested.

title: Split WebSocket terminal payload routing and failure recovery
rationale: Full split routing and fallback/degraded recovery preservation are implemented with regression tests.

title: Stability validation and non-2002 operational verification
rationale: Automated checks are recorded as passing, but non-2002 live split validation and long-running browser soak remain open.
